who: finance ops managers in accounting firms processing 5–15 bank statements/week
offer: For finance ops managers in accounting firms processing 5–15 bank statements/week, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate cash flow summaries instead of manual tracking and summarization of cash flow.
problem: Inconsistent cash flow visibility due to manual compilation of bank statements.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for finance ops managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach with demo video to finance ops managers
Community forums sharing tools for finance ops managers
try_it: Let users try manual input for 1-3 bank statements
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as user templates
Allow CSV import for existing data
